最初，该试剂是为工业消费市场开发的一种防腐防水剂。后来发现它也有许多家用用途。根据生产公司的宣传，该产品配方是在第四十次实验中成功研发出来的（WD-40是“Water Displacement-40th Attempt”（防水剂第40次测试）的缩写）。该产品主要由各种碳氢化合物组成。
description.en:
跳蚤市场: 15,524₽ | 物品价值: 17,261 | Therapist报价: 10,874₽购买渠道 @ Fence 等级1 < 22,439₽

任务需要 (✔) x1 > Spa Tour - Part 3 @ Peacekeeper

配方需要 x1 > 100毫升WD-40 x2 @ 卫生间 等级2 < … | Δ ≈ 31,692₽
配方需要 x1 > 12/70 AP-20独头弹 x50 @ 工作台 等级3 (猎人之路 - 流浪汉✔)  < … + 火药 x3 + 7毫米 12c x50 | Δ ≈ -183,330₽

交易需要 x2 @ Mechanic 等级2 > GLOCK 17 9x19手枪 < … | Δ ≈ 2,355₽
交易需要 x1 @ Mechanic 等级2 > Fab Defence GL Shock枪托 < … | Δ ≈ 12,244₽
交易需要 x1 @ Peacekeeper 等级3 > Ferfrans CRD 5.56x45 后座缓冲装置 < … | Δ ≈ 24,366₽

Initially, this agent was developed for industrial consumers as an anti-corrosive water repellent. It was later discovered that it also had plenty of domestic use applications. According to legend, the product's formula was developed on the fortieth attempt (WD-40 as short for Water Displacement-40th Attempt). The product consists mostly of various hydrocarbons.
